title: BEM-866 Claude workflow inputs
objective:
Run script:
"""
candidates = [
    Path('.github/workflows/claude.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/auditor.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_autoprocess.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/audit_mailbox_watcher.yml'),
    Path('.github/workflows/mailbox_dispatcher.yml')
]
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem866_claude_inputs')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for f in candidates:
    text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
    lines = text.splitlines()
    input_names = []
    in_inputs = False
    base_indent = None
    for line in lines:
        stripped = line.strip()
        indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
        if stripped == 'inputs:':
            in_inputs = True
            base_indent = indent
            continue
        if in_inputs:
            if stripped and indent <= base_indent:
                in_inputs = False
                continue
            if stripped.endswith(':') and not stripped.startswith(('description:', 'required:', 'default:', 'type:', 'options:')):
                input_names.append(stripped[:-1])
    flags = []
    low = text.lower()
    for token in ['workflow_dispatch', 'task_path', 'response_path', 'trace_id', 'mailbox', 'from_claude', 'claude']:
        if token in low:
            flags.append(token)
    safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in f.name)
    inputs_slug = '_'.join(input_names)[:120] if input_names else 'NO_INPUTS_FOUND'
    marker = outdir / (safe + '__INPUTS__' + ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in inputs_slug) + '.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude workflow inputs\nWorkflow: ' + str(f) + '\nExists: ' + str(f.exists()) + '\nFlags: ' + ', '.join(flags) + '\nInputs:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + x for x in input_names) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(marker))
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CLAUDE_WORKFLOW_INPUTS_INDEX.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-866 Claude workflow inputs index\nCandidates: ' + str(len(candidates)) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('inspected Claude workflow dispatch inputs')
"""
No issue comments.
